data.title: Bitcoin Miners Face Surging Production Costs as Sector Pressures Intensify
data.description:
Bitcoin’s mining industry is entering one of its most expensive phases ever, with new data showing a sharp rise in the average cost to produce a single BTC. The latest chart from CoinShares highlights a widening gap between low-cost operators and high-cost producers, underscoring how fragile miner profitability has become in 2025.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-miners-face-surging-production-costs-as-sector-pressures-intensify/

data.title: Meme Coins Are Quietly Evolving From Speculation To Utility
data.description:
Meme coin utility is transforming the crypto landscape as projects once dismissed as jokes now integrate gaming platforms, revenue-sharing mechanisms, and DeFi infrastructure. As community-driven tokens evolve beyond pure speculation heading into 2026, utility-based meme assets are emerging as a legitimate trend that could reshape crypto markets in the year ahead. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/Opinion/25/12/49216923/meme-coins-are-quietly-evolving-from-speculation-to-utility?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: BlackRock CEO Says Sovereign Wealth Funds Are Quietly Buying Bitcoin on the Dip
data.description:
BlackRock CEO Larry Fink has confirmed that multiple sovereign wealth funds are accumulating Bitcoin, taking advantage of recent price declines to expand their long-term holdings. Speaking in a December 4, 2025 interview with Forbes, Fink disclosed that these state-backed investment funds “bought more” as Bitcoin retreated sharply from its record highs.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/blackrock-ceo-says-sovereign-wealth-funds-are-quietly-buying-bitcoin-on-the-dip/

source: https://decrypt.co/350935/how-ai-wiz-used-chatgpt-turn-tables-scammer

data.title: Bitcoin vs Gold Debate Heats Up Between CZ and Peter Schiff – Here Is Why Their Clash Matters
data.description:
The ongoing debate between leading figures in the cryptocurrency and traditional investment sectors, specifically between Changpeng Zhao (CZ), the CEO of Binance, and Peter Schiff, a prominent advocate for precious metals, has intensified significantly. This clash holds substantial importance not only for their respective followers but also for the broader discourse surrounding the future of money and value storage. In this article, we will explore the reasons behind their fierce confrontation, the perspectives they bring to the table, and the implications of their arguments on the evolving financial landscape.
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-vs-gold-debate-heats-up-between-cz-and-peter-schiff-here-is-why-their-clash-matters/

data.title: ‘Backed by nothing’: Peter Schiff says bitcoin can’t rival tokenized gold in debate with CZ
data.description:
Longtime gold advocate Peter Schiff said bitcoin’s demand is fading despite ETF inflows, corporate accumulation, and intense market hype.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/381404/backed-nothing-peter-schiff-bitcoin-cant-rival-tokenized-gold-debate-cz?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
